checks.evidence: current generated safe function index is hashed and counted directly against its committed baseline
current canonical raw API inventory is hashed and counted directly against its committed baseline
the authored core export source is hashed and its explicit exports are counted directly
carrier manifests, native archive sizes, and SHA-256 values are read directly; ar and nm are invoked when available
fresh cargo package archives are decompressed and inspected without using the package-content audit output
target-specific CI runs the packaged consumers; this document does not promote a stored simulator report to independent proof
requires a separately acquired checksum-verified cache and matching GNU Fortran toolchain; it remains an explicit release gate
cargo public-api snapshots and cargo semver-checks invocations are run outside this generator and recorded by the release operator
a transactional recomputation identifies stale generated evidence, but semantic documentation still requires independent review before regeneration is accepted
